item.description: The National Mall has reopened after crowds sheltered due to severe weather in Washington, D.C. President Trump is expected to deliver his speech as planned. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports on what to expect from the Salute to America 250 celebration.

media:content.media:title: National Mall reopens after crowds shelter amid severe weather in D.C.
media:content.media:description: The National Mall has reopened after crowds sheltered due to severe weather in Washington, D.C. President Trump is expected to deliver his speech as planned. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports on what to expect from the Salute to America 250 celebration.

item.title: National Mall reopens after crowds shelter amid severe weather in D.C.

item.dc:creator: Megan Brand
Katie Taylor
Zara Morris
Marco Gacina
item.description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump insisted his much-touted July Fourth show would go on despite severe weather that threw the event into chaos.

media:content.media:text: A crowd gathered in front of a large, illuminated outdoor stage at night.
media:content.media:description: A view of the stage before US President Donald Trump delivers remarks during the "Salute to America" Independence Day celebration on the National Mall in Washington, DC, on July 4, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A throng of people moving through a street at night.
media:content.media:description: Visitors returning to the National Mall for the "Salute to America 250" Fourth of July celebrations on Saturday night.

media:content.media:text: Two US Park police officers face toward three women, two of them wearing MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN t-shirts.
media:content.media:description: Earlier on Saturday, US Park Police officers directed attendees to evacuate from the National Mall in anticipation of severe weather.

media:content.media:text: People dressed in red, white and blue attire seated in chairs at night.
media:content.media:description: Attendees waiting for President Trump's address on the National Mall on Saturday night.

item.title: Weather emergencies disrupt Trump’s Fourth of July plans

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
Austin Mullen
item.description: Record-setting heat is suspected in 25 deaths from the Deep South to the Midwest to the East Coast, authorities said, with the temperature highs also suppressing some Fourth of July celebrations.

media:content.media:text: Two soldiers in camouflage help carry a man through a crowd.
media:content.media:description: National Guard soldiers assisting a visitor near the entrance to the Great American State Fair in Washington on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Two paramedics lifting a person on a stretcher into a red emergency vehicle.
media:content.media:description: National Guard soldiers assisting a visitor near the entrance to the Great American State Fair in Washington on Saturday.

item.title: Record heat suspected in over 20 deaths as severe weather puts damper on Fourth of July festivities

item.dc:creator: Peter Nicholas
item.description: No presidential distinction rivals having one’s likeness carved onto Mt. Rushmore — an honor destined to elude Donald Trump, though his allies have pushed for it.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump.
media:content.media:description: Donald Trump speaks during a rally at Mount Rushmore National Memorial on July 3, 2026, in Keystone, S.D.

media:content.media:text: Men dressed as Presidents Abraham Lincoln and George Washington
media:content.media:description: "It was a bit of a rocky journey," an Abraham Lincoln impersonator said, describing his trip down from Mount Rushmore to mark the Fourth of July celebration at the monument.

item.title: Trump warns of communist ‘threat’ and touts America’s strength at Mount Rushmore

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: The New York mayor gave a solidly pro-immigration speech, flanked by recently naturalized citizens, hours before the president plans to give his own address at Mount Rushmore.

media:content.media:text: Mayor Mamdani Commemorates America's 250th Anniversary
media:content.media:description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani during a speech to commemorate America's 250th anniversary in New York on July 3, 2026.

item.title: Mamdani offers a contrast to Trump’s vision for America in a 250th anniversary address

item.description: NBC News’ Richard Engel is in Tehran where huge crowds are gathering for the funeral of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Our team was at the mosque where mourners were chanting “death to America.” The ayatollah was killed in American and Israeli airstrikes at the start of the war earlier this year.

media:content.media:title: Inside Tehran as funeral for late Iranian supreme leader
media:content.media:description: NBC News’ Richard Engel is in Tehran where huge crowds are gathering for the funeral of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Our team was at the mosque where mourners were chanting “death to America.” The ayatollah was killed in American and Israeli airstrikes at the start of the war earlier this year.

item.title: Inside Tehran as funeral for late Iranian supreme leader

item.description: We’re learning new details about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s star-studded wedding at Madison Square Garden last night. One guest says they “laughed” and “danced,” and another describes the performances at the event as “big ones.” And Swift’s team says their friend Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony. NBC News’ Emille Ikeda has the latest.

media:content.media:title: What we’re learning about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding
media:content.media:description: We’re learning new details about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s star-studded wedding at Madison Square Garden last night. One guest says they “laughed” and “danced,” and another describes the performances at the event as “big ones.” And Swift’s team says their friend Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony. NBC News’ Emille Ikeda has the latest.

item.title: What we’re learning about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding

item.dc:creator: Kelly O'Donnell
Michael Kosnar
item.description: The FBI says it has seized more than 600 drones near FIFA World Cup sites after authorities determined the devices violated restricted airspace since the tournament began on June 11.

media:content.media:text: An overhead aerial photo of Seattle Stadium.
media:content.media:description: Most of the drones law enforcement detects have resulted in ticketed citations and seizures.

media:content.media:text: A DHS agent, seen from behind, looking up toward a drone in the sky.
media:content.media:description: Most of the drones law enforcement detects have resulted in ticketed citations and seizures.

item.title: FBI seized more than 600 drones near World Cup events

item.description: Brahim Díaz asistió al delantero, quien quedó mano a mano frente al arco y sentenció este partido de Octavos de Final de la Copa del Mundo 2026.

media:content.media:title: ¡Rugen los Leones del Atlas! Soufiane Rahimi sentencia el 0-3 de Marruecos sobre Canadá
media:content.media:description: Brahim Díaz asistió al delantero, quien quedó mano a mano frente al arco y sentenció este partido de Octavos de Final de la Copa del Mundo 2026.

item.title: ¡Rugen los Leones del Atlas! Soufiane Rahimi sentencia el 0-3 de Marruecos sobre Canadá

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Tim Rohan
item.description: Since this World Cup began, how many people have learned about Cape Verde, the small nation off the west coast of Africa?

media:content.media:text: Egypt Australia WCup Soccer
media:content.media:description: Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha saves a free kick from Argentina's Lionel Messi in Miami Gardens, Fla., on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Lionel Messi scores Argentina's first goal Cape Verde.
media:content.media:description: Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha saves a free kick from Argentina's Lionel Messi in Miami Gardens, Fla., on Friday.

item.title: Argentina, Messi pushed to the brink by Cape Verde and its 40-year-old goalkeeper

item.description: En la rueda de prensa previa al México vs Inglaterra por los octavos de final de la Copa Mundial, el técnico Thomas Tuchel y el mediocampista Jordan Henderson aseguraron que los ingleses están listos para este reto, en un partido que será histórico.

media:content.media:title: Jordan Henderson: “No hay nada más grande que jugar contra México en este estadio”
media:content.media:description: En la rueda de prensa previa al México vs Inglaterra por los octavos de final de la Copa Mundial, el técnico Thomas Tuchel y el mediocampista Jordan Henderson aseguraron que los ingleses están listos para este reto, en un partido que será histórico.

item.title: Jordan Henderson: “No hay nada más grande que jugar contra México en este estadio”

item.description: Gustavo Gómez lamentó la eliminación ante Francia, pero destacó la entrega de Paraguay durante el Mundial. Agradeció el apoyo de la afición y aseguró que competir ante las mejores selecciones fortalece al equipo y demuestra que la Albirroja nunca se rinde

media:content.media:title: Gustavo Gómez: “Nos vamos tristes, pero orgullosos”
media:content.media:description: Gustavo Gómez lamentó la eliminación ante Francia, pero destacó la entrega de Paraguay durante el Mundial. Agradeció el apoyo de la afición y aseguró que competir ante las mejores selecciones fortalece al equipo y demuestra que la Albirroja nunca se rinde

item.title: Gustavo Gómez: “Nos vamos tristes, pero orgullosos”

item.description: Marruecos goleó 3-0 a Canadá y se convirtió en la primera selección africana con dos presencias en cuartos de final de un Mundial. Francia sufrió, pero venció 1-0 a Paraguay con un gol de penal de Kylian Mbappé para seguir en carrera.

media:content.media:title: Marruecos hace historia y Francia avanza con Mbappé
media:content.media:description: Marruecos goleó 3-0 a Canadá y se convirtió en la primera selección africana con dos presencias en cuartos de final de un Mundial. Francia sufrió, pero venció 1-0 a Paraguay con un gol de penal de Kylian Mbappé para seguir en carrera.

item.title: Marruecos hace historia y Francia avanza con Mbappé

item.description: Marruecos venció con autoridad 3-0 a Canadá y llegará en gran momento a los cuartos de final ante Francia, quienes también superaron de gran manera a Paraguay con una victoria de 1-0. Nuestros expertos nos cuentan a detalle sus virtudes y carencias.

media:content.media:title: Marruecos y Francia se verán en cuartos de final y nuestros expertos analizan su rendimiento
media:content.media:description: Marruecos venció con autoridad 3-0 a Canadá y llegará en gran momento a los cuartos de final ante Francia, quienes también superaron de gran manera a Paraguay con una victoria de 1-0. Nuestros expertos nos cuentan a detalle sus virtudes y carencias.

item.title: Marruecos y Francia se verán en cuartos de final y nuestros expertos analizan su rendimiento

item.description: El defensor paraguayo se mostró lleno de emociones tras la eliminación de Paraguay, reafirma su orgullo al defender la camiseta de Paraguay y reflexiona sobre la actuación guaraní en la Copa Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Matías Galarza: ”Me voy orgulloso de representar a mi país”
media:content.media:description: El defensor paraguayo se mostró lleno de emociones tras la eliminación de Paraguay, reafirma su orgullo al defender la camiseta de Paraguay y reflexiona sobre la actuación guaraní en la Copa Mundial.

item.title: Matías Galarza: ”Me voy orgulloso de representar a mi país”

item.description: Bradley Barcola aseguró que Francia superó un partido muy físico ante Paraguay y destacó el ingreso de Désiré Doué, quien provocó el penal de la victoria. El atacante ya puso la mira en Marruecos, rival de los franceses en cuartos.

media:content.media:title: Barcola: “Nunca habíamos jugado un partido así con tantos golpes”
media:content.media:description: Bradley Barcola aseguró que Francia superó un partido muy físico ante Paraguay y destacó el ingreso de Désiré Doué, quien provocó el penal de la victoria. El atacante ya puso la mira en Marruecos, rival de los franceses en cuartos.

item.title: Barcola: “Nunca habíamos jugado un partido así con tantos golpes”

item.description: El mediocampista francés se muestra contento con el resultado de “Le Bleus” ante Paraguay, a pesar del calor desgastante de Philadelphia. Enfrentarán a Marruecos en cuartos de final.

media:content.media:title: Manu Koné: ”Lo di todo y estoy satisfecho por la victoria que conseguimos”
media:content.media:description: El mediocampista francés se muestra contento con el resultado de “Le Bleus” ante Paraguay, a pesar del calor desgastante de Philadelphia. Enfrentarán a Marruecos en cuartos de final.

item.title: Manu Koné: ”Lo di todo y estoy satisfecho por la victoria que conseguimos”

item.description: Tras superar el juego físico de Paraguay, Francia avanza. Kylian Mbappé y Deschamps destacaron la intensidad del duelo, mientras que el arquero paraguayo Orlando Gill lamenta la definición del partido por penal, pero se va con la frente en alto.

media:content.media:title: Francia sufre en el avance a cuartos de final a causa de un Paraguay defensivo
media:content.media:description: Tras superar el juego físico de Paraguay, Francia avanza. Kylian Mbappé y Deschamps destacaron la intensidad del duelo, mientras que el arquero paraguayo Orlando Gill lamenta la definición del partido por penal, pero se va con la frente en alto.

item.title: Francia sufre en el avance a cuartos de final a causa de un Paraguay defensivo

item.description: El mediocampista de la Selección de Francia sabía que Paraguay era un rival complicado físicamente, al haberlos estudiado estaban preparados para un duro enfrentamiento, aún así lograron avanzar.

media:content.media:title: Cherki: ”La fortaleza del rival fue convertir el duelo en una guerra, estábamos preparados para eso”
media:content.media:description: El mediocampista de la Selección de Francia sabía que Paraguay era un rival complicado físicamente, al haberlos estudiado estaban preparados para un duro enfrentamiento, aún así lograron avanzar.

item.title: Cherki: ”La fortaleza del rival fue convertir el duelo en una guerra, estábamos preparados para eso”

item.description: Tras la revisión en el VAR, el árbitro decidió marcar penal en favor de Francia, el cual fue cambiado por un gol gracias a la ejecución de Kylian Mbappé, quien llegó a siete anotaciones en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

media:content.media:title: Kylian Mbappé anota desde los once pasos y pone el primero de Francia sobre Paraguay
media:content.media:description: Tras la revisión en el VAR, el árbitro decidió marcar penal en favor de Francia, el cual fue cambiado por un gol gracias a la ejecución de Kylian Mbappé, quien llegó a siete anotaciones en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

item.title: Kylian Mbappé anota desde los once pasos y pone el primero de Francia sobre Paraguay

item.dc:creator: Mili Godio
item.description: The best 4th of July sales are happening now. Our editors found worthwhile deals on Apple, Yeti, Medicube and more.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

item.title: The best Fourth of July sales to shop right now

item.dc:creator: Kelly O'Donnell
Michael Kosnar

media:content.media:text: An overhead aerial photo of Seattle Stadium.

item.title: FBI seized more than 600 drones near World Cup events

media:content.media:text: Two soldiers in camouflage help carry a man through a crowd.
media:content.media:description: National Guard soldiers assisting a visitor near the entrance to the Great American State Fair in Washington on Saturday.

item.dc:creator: Megan Brand
Katie Taylor
Zara Morris
Marco Gacina
item.description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump insisted his much-touted July Fourth show would go on despite severe weather that threw the event into chaos.

media:content.media:text: A crowd gathered in front of a large, illuminated outdoor stage at night.
media:content.media:description: A view of the stage before US President Donald Trump delivers remarks during the "Salute to America" Independence Day celebration on the National Mall in Washington, DC, on July 4, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A throng of people moving through a street at night.
media:content.media:description: Visitors returning to the National Mall for the "Salute to America 250" Fourth of July celebrations on Saturday night.

media:content.media:text: Two US Park police officers face toward three women, two of them wearing MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN t-shirts.
media:content.media:description: Earlier on Saturday, US Park Police officers directed attendees to evacuate from the National Mall in anticipation of severe weather.

media:content.media:text: People dressed in red, white and blue attire seated in chairs at night.
media:content.media:description: Attendees waiting for President Trump's address on the National Mall on Saturday night.

item.title: Weather emergencies disrupt Trump’s Fourth of July plans

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: After France lost the 2022 World Cup Final, it would have been understandable if the team was dealing with an emotional hangover even four years later.

media:content.media:text: on-field action during a world cup soccer match
media:content.media:description: Kylian Mbappé of France scores on a penalty kick during the World Cup match between Paraguay and France in Philadelphia on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: on-field action during a world cup soccer match
media:content.media:description: Kylian Mbappé of France scores on a penalty kick during the World Cup match between Paraguay and France in Philadelphia on Saturday.

item.title: Penalty saves France’s World Cup run in a scrappy match against Paraguay
